TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kalibuan, title = Kalibuan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalibuan} }

S.FORM: alang Kalibuan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 191 buwan, 692 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 632 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 60 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 86%, Tayan 1%, Amis 2%, Cou 12%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kalibuan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kalibuan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kalibuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kalibuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kalibuan hya' ga Mahavun. tay mkyahu' na Kalibuan hya' ga Hanbizan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh tay mkraya' na Kalibuan hya' ga Mahavun. tay mkyahu' na Kalibuan hya' ga Hanbizan.

alang Kalibuan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 191 buwan, 692 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 632 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 60 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 86%, Tayan 1%, Amis 2%, Cou 12%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kalibuan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kalibuan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Kalibuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kalibuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kalibuan hya' ga Mahavun. tay mkyahu' na Kalibuan hya' ga Hanbizan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh tay mkraya' na Kalibuan hya' ga Mahavun. tay mkyahu' na Kalibuan hya' ga Hanbizan.
S.PHON: alaŋ kaliβuan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, ʦ~ʨou **%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kaliβuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kaliβuan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaliβuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaliβuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kaliβuan ħjaʔ ɣa maħa*un. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaliβuan ħjaʔ ɣa ħanβizan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ taj mkrajaʔ na kaliβuan ħjaʔ ɣa maħa*un. taj mkjaħuʔ na kaliβuan ħjaʔ ɣa ħanβizan.
